name: Thai Chicken & Coconut Soup Vmxv03a
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh lemongrass, cut into 1/4 inch slices
1 large chicken breast, half with skin and ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the first three ingredients to a boil in a heavy medium saucepan.
2. Reduce heat, then add the chicken and simmer until almost cooked through, turning occasionally about 12 minutes.
3. Transfer the chicken to a plate and let it cool.
4. Remove the skin and bones from the chicken.
5. Cut the meat into 1/2 inch pieces.
6. Strain the soup through a sieve into a small saucepan.
7. Add 1 tablespoon lime juice and jalapeno to the soup and simmer until reduced to about 2 cups, approximately 20 minutes.
8. Add the chicken and simmer just until heated through.
9. Taste and adjust with more lime juice if desired.
10. Ladle the soup into bowls and sprinkle with fresh cilantro.
